title: FPS Monitor
description: Displays FPS, Memory, Ping and more in-game and in the game bar.
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/1LtRXYe.png)
## FPS Monitor 
is a lightweight, configurable and versatile tool to display game information on screen for easy access and readability. The mod can display the clients FPS (Frames per second), server connection ping and memory usage both on screen as a HUD and in the game-window title bar. The mod is coded to both run on Forge & Fabric.

![](https://i.imgur.com/UVdE34a.png)
![](https://i.imgur.com/r5rgK53.png)
### HUD:
The way the information in the HUD is displayed can be configured in the mods lang file. Each element in the HUD can also be toggled off individually in the config.  
![](https://i.imgur.com/zY9DaFL.png)
![](https://i.imgur.com/9i4rFyG.png)
### Game-Window:
Enable the `game_window_info` option to display the information in the game-window title.
![](https://i.imgur.com/unA8TsZ.png)
### Settings:
Here is how the in-game settings menu look when using Cloth Config for Fabric.
![](https://i.imgur.com/ympLf7Y.png)
### Key Bindings:
You can assign key bindings to toggle each HUD element on and off or even toggle the entire HUD off with the "Toggle All" option.
Fabric: Keybindings only work when Fabric API is installed.
![](https://i.imgur.com/ujR2gyb.png)
